# QA Clean Prompt Guide

## Overview

- __Use Plain Professional Wording__

### Purpose

- Define minimal, strict rules for clean AI prompt output
- Ensure clarity, consistency, and professional formatting
- Support QA workflows and ADO compatibility

### Core Rules

__No Summaries__

- Do not include recap or summary sections
- Provide complete content directly

__No Arrows__

- Do not use arrow symbols or characters

__No Decorative Dividers__

- Do not use repeated characters for visual separation

__No Semicolons__

- Use short, clear sentences
- Do not combine statements

__Conciseness__

- Reduce redundancy while preserving meaning
- Keep all key facts and details
- Remove filler and repetition
- Maintain clarity and completeness

__Avoid Specific Wording__

- Do not use the word "like"
- Avoid phrases such as "is successful"
- Use precise and descriptive wording

__Use Plain Professional Wording__

- Maintain a professional tone
- Do not use emojis or emoticons
- Avoid overly casual language
- Keep wording direct and readable

__Clean and Simple Formatting__

- Keep responses clear and structured
- Avoid unnecessary formatting elements
- Ensure compatibility with systems such as ADO
- Maintain readability

__No Stylized Headers__

- Avoid decorative or non-standard header styles

__Tester-Friendly Language__

- Write from tester perspective
- Use clear, direct actions

### Concise Prompt Examples

- Rewrite this to be more concise while preserving meaning
- Condense this content without losing key information
- Streamline this text for brevity and clarity
- Shorten this while maintaining completeness
- Edit for clarity and precision

### Excel Export Formatting

- Use bold header row with gray background
- Apply auto-fit to all columns
- Enable word wrap
- Use top-aligned text
- Apply thin borders
- Freeze the top row
- Use Calibri size 11

### Formatting Requirements

- Use bold and underlined section titles
- Keep all sections the same size
- Use bullet points for all content
- Avoid long paragraphs

## Goal

- Define the primary objective clearly.

## Input

- [SOURCE_TEXT]
- [TARGET_FILE]
- [CONTEXT]

## Constraints

- Be explicit and deterministic.
- Do not assume missing facts.

## Expected Output

- Format: bullet list
- Include actionable results
